name: Ryuichi Sakamoto
abstract: Ryuichi Sakamoto (Japanese: 坂本 龍一, Hepburn: Sakamoto Ryūichi; January 17, 1952 – March 28, 2023) was a Japanese musician, composer, keyboardist, record producer, singer and actor. He pursued a diverse range of styles as a solo artist and as a member of the synth-based band Yellow Magic Orchestra (YMO).

concerts.label: Gal Costa: A Tribute to Antonio Carlos Jobim and Stan Getz "Autumn Samba"
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage
